tasks_completed: Project setup: pyproject.toml, src/ package structure, install deps (payments-py, fastapi, exa-py, httpx, python-dotenv)
tasks_remaining: Implement Exa search MCP server in src/server.py with PaymentsMCP (exa_search + exa_get_contents tools, NVM key gating)
Implement src/setup_agent.py (register agent+plan with Nevermined) and src/client.py (self-buy flow)
learnings: payments-py 1.3.4 does NOT have a separate [mcp] extra — PaymentsMCP is bundled in core package but requires fastapi separately
fastapi must be listed explicitly in deps (not pulled in by payments-py[mcp] since that extra doesn't exist)
exa-py 2.7.0 and httpx 0.28.1 were already installed in .venv (Python 3.14)
Import warning: payments_py/x402/types_v2.py Field name 'schema' shadows BaseModel attr — cosmetic, not a blocker
